name: Brambles Limited
analysis: BXB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.3800, stop A$17.2458, target A$22.2200 (1.33:1) — then trail it.
